title: Harris Seriously Good Work Smarter Frame 9in
features: For use with all Harris 9" roller sleeves
Clean with warm soapy water, dry completely before storing.
description: Designed for a consistent and even finish, this 9-inch roller frame offers superior comfort during use. It features a 1.5-inch (38mm) roller frame cage diameter and is compatible with extension poles, making it suitable for painting larger areas efficiently. ​
